opinion.h: GILHOOL ET AL. v. CHAIRMAN, PHILADELPHIA COUNTY BOARD OF ELECTIONS, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF PENNSYLVANIA No. 1069. Decided March 2, 1970
opinion.p: Levy Anderson for Chairman, Philadelphia County Board of Elections, et al., and Edward R. Becker and William Austin Meehan for the Republican City Committee et al., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
